changes.exact_quote: Requisite Holders means Major Investors holding at least 55% of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class, and Major Investor means a holder of at least 500000 Series A shares. Consent records are retained for 5 years, and the vote tabulation is circulated within 12 hours after the deadline.
changes.proposed_redline: Requisite Holders means Major Investors holding at least a majority of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class, and Major Investor means a holder of at least 1,000,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock.

changes.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Before any holder transfers shares other than to a Permitted Transferee, the holder must first offer the shares to the Major Investors on the same terms stated in the transfer notice. Only if the Major Investors decline or fail to purchase all offered shares may the Company exercise a secondary purchase right.
changes.proposed_redline: Before any holder transfers shares other than to a Permitted Transferee, the holder must first offer the shares to the Company on the same terms stated in the transfer notice. Only if the Company declines or fails to purchase all offered shares may eligible investors exercise any secondary purchase right.

changes.exact_quote: Investor consent is required for every budget, hire, vendor contract, and ordinary-course product decision.
changes.proposed_redline: Company may conduct ordinary-course operations without investor consent, including budgets, hiring, vendor contracts, product decisions, and routine financing administration.

changes.exact_quote: Any side-letter MFN right automatically imports any more favorable economic, information, governance, veto, board, transfer, operational consent, or other investor right granted to any other investor after the date of this Agreement.
changes.proposed_redline: Any side-letter MFN right applies only to the economic fee terms and information delivery dates expressly listed in the applicable side letter. No MFN imports governance, veto, board, transfer, operational consent, or other investor rights unless the Company expressly agrees in a signed amendment.

summary: All eight T2-N response children reviewed against the v4 answer key.
